videoSnippet.title: It's My Birthday!! || Arjun vs Nikolas || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Erigaisi Arjun (2761) - Theodorou, Nikolas (2634)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.06.15
C42 Petrov, classical attack

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.Nxe5 d6 4.Nf3 Nxe4 5.d4 d5 6.Bd3 Nc6 7.O-O Bg4 8.Re1 Be7 9.c3 f5 10.Qb3 O-O 11.Nbd2 Na5 12.Qc2 Nc6 13.b4 a6 14.Rb1 Bd6 15.b5 axb5 16.Rxb5 Kh8 17.h3 Nxd2 18.Nxd2 Qh4 19.Bf1 Ne7 20.Rxb7 f4 21.hxg4 f3 22.Nxf3 Rxf3 23.Re5 Bxe5 24.dxe5 Rff8 25.Qe2 Ng6 26.g3 Qe7 27.f4 Rfb8 28.Rxb8+ Rxb8 29.Qd3 c6 30.Be3 Qa3 31.Bd4 Qb2 32.e6 Ra8 33.c4 dxc4 34.Qxc4 Qd2 35.a4 Ne7 36.Bc5 Nd5 37.Bf2 Qc3 38.Qe4 Qb4 39.Qxb4 Nxb4 40.a5 Nd5 41.a6 Nc7 42.e7 Kg8 43.Bc4+ Nd5 44.a7 Kf7 45.Bc5 Ke6 46.Ba6
